title: The Rainy Season Packing Checklist: How Triple-Layer Shrink Wrapping Safeguards Mattresses from Sudden Cloudbursts
excerpt: Rainy season packing checklist: triple-layer shrink wrap mattresses sudden cloudbursts Kremt move protection Addis Ababa packing guide.
content:
The rainy season packing checklist: how triple-layer shrink wrapping safeguards mattresses from sudden cloudbursts

Kremt sudden cloudburst on unload ramp soaks mattress in ninety seconds—mold follows week later. Rainy season packing checklist centers triple-layer shrink wrap: bag, stretch film, and tarp discipline from bedroom to truck dry zone.

This checklist safeguards mattresses from rainy season cloudbursts with triple-layer shrink wrapping.

Triple-layer system

  • Layer 1: Mattress plastic bag OEM or heavy-duty purchase.
  • Layer 2: Stretch wrap full perimeter seams taped.
  • Layer 3: Furniture blanket then wrap again or waterproof tarp truck side.

Rainy season move-day protocol

Monitor sky radar morning; canopy popup if client provides; truck closed box not open bed; unload destination covered corridor if tower; towel dry exterior wrap before bedroom entry; never store wet wrap inside unit.

Other rain-vulnerable items

Upholstery same triple logic; cardboard double tape bottom; electronics plastic seal; books plastic liner box.

Timing

Morning load bias; avoid April peak afternoon storms when possible; flex date contract clause one day.

Active Movers Kremt materials

Shrink wrap included rainy season flag dispatch; truck fleet enclosed bias; crew trained rapid re-wrap if drizzle surprise.

Conclusion

Triple-layer shrink wrap is rainy season mattress insurance—cloudburst survives when wrap complete truck enclosed and wet outer layer stripped before sleep.
author: Active Movers Team
